name: usage-menubar
description: macOS menubar app for Claude and Codex usage tracking

scripts.start: env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE -u ELECTRON_RENDERER_URL -u ELECTRON_EXEC_PATH -u ELECTRON_MAJOR_VER -u ELECTRON_CLI_ARGS electron-vite preview
scripts.dev: env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE -u ELECTRON_RENDERER_URL -u ELECTRON_EXEC_PATH -u ELECTRON_MAJOR_VER -u ELECTRON_CLI_ARGS electron-vite dev
scripts.pack: pnpm build && env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE -u ELECTRON_RENDERER_URL -u ELECTRON_EXEC_PATH -u ELECTRON_MAJOR_VER -u ELECTRON_CLI_ARGS electron-builder --dir
scripts.dist: pnpm build && env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE -u ELECTRON_RENDERER_URL -u ELECTRON_EXEC_PATH -u ELECTRON_MAJOR_VER -u ELECTRON_CLI_ARGS electron-builder --mac
scripts.dist:mac:prod: pnpm build && env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE -u ELECTRON_RENDERER_URL -u ELECTRON_EXEC_PATH -u ELECTRON_MAJOR_VER -u ELECTRON_CLI_ARGS electron-builder --mac --arm64
scripts.dist:mac:prod:x64: pnpm build && env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE -u ELECTRON_RENDERER_URL -u ELECTRON_EXEC_PATH -u ELECTRON_MAJOR_VER -u ELECTRON_CLI_ARGS electron-builder --mac --x64
